title: helia campanulacea
intro: Helia campanulacea, also known as Indian gentian or gentian, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and acting as a natural remedy for respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Indian medicine to treat various ailments, including diabetes and skin conditions.
